title: Anevix Personal Server Pack
description: A modpack consisting of quality-of-life enhancements, popular content and lesser-known mods of admirable quality. This pack includes mods that enhance the rendering and availability of information.
body:
This modpack is intended for private use among friend's on a server.
It is Designed to play mostly like the vanilla game with some additions to enhance the experience.

Includes new terrain generation, new blocks, weapons, items and most importantly, a variety of performance enhancement mods.

### **Requirements**

Make Sure to download the latest versions for BOTH the server AND Client

Version required: Fabric 1.20.1

This pack is intended to be run with AT LEAST 6 GB of allocated RAM.

### **Some Mods Included in the pack**
- Terralith
- Sodium
- Iris
- Better X
- Chipped
- Suplimentaries
- Roughly Enough Items (REI)
- A variety of Yung's Structure overhaul mods
- Mythic Metals
- Aquamirae
- Waystones
- Marium's Soulslike Weaponry
